_comment: The REVIEW artifact: the Decision produced by checking context-view-resident.json with NO model and NO fak engine in the loop. A lossless 'snippet' over a TRUSTED source that is resident (source_digest_now == source.digest) and re-folds exactly (refold_digest == body_digest) is a WITNESSED FOLD of its current source => allow. The verdict turns on the digests, not on the bytes; the witness discloses only the disposition, never the view's content.
witness: RESIDENT + FRESH + RE-FOLDS: a witnessed fold of its source
